creator: sw@anthologeek.net
text:
A patch in the port tree disables ntop's -w option. Unfortunately it is a weird behaviour for people that don't know about this patch. I propose to add a simple line into ntop's man page.

Fix: Add a patch in the port tree, for:
How-To-Repeat: 
Install /usr/ports/net/ntop

# ntop -w 8080
-w mode is disabled for security reasons.
